steps.title: Find the true subject
steps.content: The subject is the singular noun phrase "Neuros Medical's technology." The phrase "alongside other such neuromodulation technologies" is set off by commas and does not make the subject plural.

steps.title: Choose the singular verb
steps.content: A is only a participle and does not form a complete verb. C and D use plural auxiliaries that do not agree with the singular subject. The sentence needs the singular complete verb phrase. The answer is B.
